clients.listDescription: Directory of visitors for the active unit. Search by name or phone; filter by visitor tags.
clients.searchPlaceholder: First name, last name, or phone…
clients.tagsFilterHint: Show clients that have any of the selected tags.
clients.noTagDefinitions: No tags configured for this unit.
clients.tagDefinitionsLoadError: Could not load tag catalog: {message}. Tags shown are from the last saved profile; editing is disabled until the catalog loads.
clients.detailFormDescription: Update name, phone, and tags. Changes apply to this unit only.
clients.tagsEditModalHint: Profile tags for this unit. Saving updates the client record immediately.
clients.visitsDescription: Tickets linked to this client in this unit.
clients.visitsEmpty: No visits recorded for this client yet.
clients.historyDescription: Who changed visitor data or tags (including from the staff ticket flow).
clients.historyEmpty: No profile or tag changes recorded yet.

statistics.title: Statistics
statistics.subtitle: Queue metrics from the pre-aggregated warehouse. Values respect your role and unit permissions.
statistics.no_unit_hint: Choose an active subdivision in the sidebar to load statistics.
statistics.unit_parent_missing_title: Cannot load statistics for this unit
statistics.unit_parent_missing_hint: This service zone is not linked to a parent subdivision. Ask an administrator to fix the unit tree.
statistics.chart_tickets_by_service_hint: Tickets created in the selected range, by business service. Pick a service to highlight its share.
statistics.chart_tickets_by_service_empty: No tickets in this range for the current filters.
statistics.chart_sla_radial_hint: Share of calls within waiting SLA for the selected range. Filter by service or view all services in scope.
statistics.chart_sla_radial_empty: No waiting SLA data in this range (no calls with a limit in scope).
statistics.chart_survey_hint: Average score on a 1–5 scale (all numeric questions). Single day — hourly; longer ranges — daily.
statistics.chart_utilization_hint: For the selected operator: share of serving vs serving + idle/break. Single day: hourly buckets; hours with no activity are omitted from percentages. Multi-day: one value per day with the same rule. Not a branch-wide counter summary.
statistics.utilization_unavailable: Utilization requires advanced reports or sufficient permissions.
statistics.chart_sla_deviations_hint: Within SLA (grey) vs breach (red) per interval. Toggle count or share. Buckets with no waiting SLA segments show 0%.
statistics.chart_radar_hint: Normalized snapshot (last ~30 days). Requires advanced reports on the plan.
statistics.radar_unavailable: Radar is not available for your plan or permissions.

operations.title: Operations
operations.subtitle: End-of-day freeze, statistics pipeline, and emergency unlocks for each subdivision.
operations.unit_hint: Operational state is tracked per subdivision (branch root), not per service zone.
operations.actions_hint: Use when automation left the kiosk or counter login blocked. All actions are audited.
operations.unlock_confirm_description: This clears kiosk freeze, counter login blocks, and stuck reconcile flags for this subdivision. Type UNLOCK to confirm.

home.title: QuokkaQ
home.subtitle: Queue Management System
home.counter_display_description: Guest survey screen at the counter — open to pair the device

units.title: Structure
units.name: Name
units.create_desc: Enter the details for the new unit.
units.tree_hint: Structure of subdivisions and service zones. Open one to manage its tabs (services, grid, stations, kiosk, etc.).
units.general_settings_description: Manage general settings for this unit.
units.company_id_required: Could not determine your organization. Try reloading the page. If the problem persists, contact support.
units.stations_and_zones_panel_description: Add counters on the subdivision itself or inside service zones (folders). Create zones here, then add stations in each zone without leaving this page. Nested subdivisions open in a full branch editor.
units.counters_direct_on_subdivision_descripti: Counters here are not grouped under a service zone.
units.nested_subdivisions_section_description: Child branches with their own tabs (services, kiosk, etc.). Open one to manage its stations and zones.
units.branch_children_empty: No service zones or nested subdivisions under this branch yet.
units.branch_tree_description: Tree structure under this subdivision. Zones show counters; nested subdivisions link to their own settings.
units.stations_on_zone_hint: This zone only groups counters. Add stations or nest zones and subdivisions below. Queue-facing settings stay on the parent subdivision.
units.zone_children_description: Add a nested subdivision or a service zone for grouping. Open a child to add stations, further zones, or nested subdivisions.
units.no_children_under_zone: No nested units yet. Add a subdivision or service zone — or manage stations on this unit above.
units.create_service_zone_dialog_desc: Creates a child service zone under this subdivision. Open it to add stations or further nesting.
units.create_subdivision_dialog_desc: Creates a child subdivision under this unit. Open it to add service zones, nested subdivisions, or stations.
units.unit_parent_zone_banner: This unit sits under service zone "{zone}".
units.hierarchy_help_subdivision_body: On the Stations tab you can add counters on this subdivision and create child service zones or nested subdivisions. Service zones are optional — stations can stay on the subdivision itself.
units.subdivision_general_hint: This is a subdivision (branch). Child units are managed on the Stations tab.
units.service_zone_folder_description: Waiting pool for this branch. Use the tabs to manage general info, the service grid, counters, kiosk, and ticket screen for this zone.
units.service_zone_general_hint: Name and code for this waiting pool. Services and pre-booking slots are managed under the parent subdivision.
units.service_zone_grid_parent_required_body: Link this zone to a parent subdivision before editing the service grid.
units.create_hierarchy_hint: Child units can only be created under a subdivision or service zone. Typical setup: Subdivision (root) → optional service zones → optional nested subdivisions → stations on the unit where you run the queue.

visitor_tags.title: Visitor tags
visitor_tags.description: Labels and colors staff can assign to visitors on active tickets. Tags are shared across this unit.
visitor_tags.label: Label
visitor_tags.empty: No tags yet. Create one for staff to use at the counter.
visitor_tags.sort_invalid: Sort order must be a number
visitor_tags.delete_confirm_desc: The tag "{label}" will be removed from all visitor profiles that had it. This cannot be undone.

counters.title: Stations
counters.description: Places where staff serve customers; attached to this unit
counters.service_zone_locked_none: This station will use the subdivision-wide queue (no service zone).
counters.service_zone_locked_zone: This station will be tied to service zone "{name}".
counters.name: Name
counters.no_counters: No stations found. Create one to get started.
counters.delete_confirm_desc: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the station "{name}".

services.title: Services
services.restricted_zone_hint: Empty means the service is available in every zone and the subdivision-wide queue.
services.name: Name
services.select_desc: Select a service to edit or create a new one
services.manage_on_separate_page: Manage services for this unit on a dedicated page
services.select_to_edit_or_click_add: Select a service to edit or click "Add New Service"
services.configuration_desc: Configure services and their layout for the kiosk.
services.unsaved_discard_confirm: You have unsaved changes. Discard them and continue?
services.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this service?
services.calendar_slot_key_hint: Used in pre-registration and when syncing with connected calendars. If two services share the same display name, this label distinguishes them; it is included in calendar event titles so the correct slots are created.

users.title: Users & Roles
users.select_user_desc: Select a user to manage their units
users.select_user_prompt: Select a user from the list to manage their units
users.assign_unit_desc: Select permissions for this user in this unit.
users.system_admin_desc: Grant full access to the system
users.roles_tab_description: Named roles with permissions per unit. Assign them to users on the Users tab.
users.global_role_access_locked_hint: This user has organization-wide access. Unit and tenant role assignments do not apply.
users.tenant_roles_units_locked_hint: Tenant roles control unit permissions for this user. Remove tenant roles to edit unit assignments and permissions manually.
users.tenant_system_role_assign_forbidden_hint: Only a tenant system administrator or platform administrator can assign this role.
users.no_permission_to_manage_unit: You cannot change assignments for this unit.
users.sso_directory_hint: Break-glass options and identity repair for SSO-linked accounts.
users.exempt_sso_sync_desc: Skip reconciling units and roles from IdP groups for this user.
users.sso_profile_opt_out_desc: Do not update name or email from the identity provider on login.
users.sso_external_hint: Use only when the SSO link must be corrected (issuer, subject, or directory object id). Requires an existing SSO link for this user.
users.sso_external_not_found: No SSO external identity found for this user.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Connect external services: calendars, authentication, and more.
integrations.calendars_description: Import slot capacity from Yandex Calendar (CalDAV) for pre-registration. Settings apply per unit.
integrations.calendar_no_access: You do not have permission to manage settings for this unit.
integrations.calendar_relocated_hint: Yandex Calendar (CalDAV) for this unit is configured under Integrations → Calendars (select this unit).
integrations.filter_unit_hint: Narrows the list below. Each calendar connection still belongs to one unit.
integrations.calendar_list_empty: No calendar connections yet. Add Google or Yandex (CalDAV) to import slots.
integrations.calendars_list_hint: Up to four calendar connections per unit (Google or Yandex CalDAV). Open a row to edit or remove.

rbac.access_source_description: Choose whether unit access is assigned manually in QuokkaQ or driven by IdP group mappings.
rbac.access_source_sso_groups: SSO groups (IdP is source of truth)
rbac.access_source_hint: When "SSO groups" is selected, configure tenant roles and group mappings below. Users can still use break-glass flags per account.
rbac.tenant_roles_description: Named roles with permissions per unit. Map IdP groups to these roles or to legacy global roles.
rbac.group_mappings_description: Map Azure AD / Entra group object IDs to a tenant role (use the System Administrator tenant role for organization-wide access).
rbac.load_error: Could not load tenant RBAC settings.
rbac.confirm_delete_role: Delete this tenant role? Group mappings that reference it may stop working.
rbac.units_matrix_hint: For each unit, choose permissions from the global catalog.
rbac.reserved_role_slug_locked: This slug is reserved for the system role.
rbac.system_role_matrix_locked_hint: This reserved role always has full permissions on every unit. Only the name and description can be changed.
rbac.no_units: Create units first to attach permissions.

desktop_terminals.title: Desktop terminals
desktop_terminals.description: Pair Tauri kiosk apps with a unit and default language. The pairing code is shown only once when you create a terminal.
desktop_terminals.table_scroll_hint: Scroll horizontally if needed; the Actions column stays pinned on the right.
desktop_terminals.actions_unavailable_revoked: Edit and revoke are unavailable for revoked terminals.
desktop_terminals.kiosk_fullscreen_hint: Saved when the device pairs (re-pair to refresh). QUOKKAQ_KIOSK_FULLSCREEN on the device overrides.
desktop_terminals.create_desc: Choose unit and default kiosk language. Save the pairing code — it will not be shown again.
desktop_terminals.code_desc: Enter this code in the desktop app together with the API base URL. This code cannot be recovered later.
desktop_terminals.revoke_confirm_desc: Devices using this pairing code will no longer be able to sign in. You can create a new terminal instead.
desktop_terminals.load_counters_error: Could not load counters for this location
desktop_terminals.feature_locked_create: Guest survey at counters is not included in your plan.
desktop_terminals.feature_locked_create_board: Counter board is not included in your plan.

grid_configuration.title: Grid Configuration
grid_configuration.overlap_warning: Warning: This overlaps with another service!
grid_configuration.select_unit_desc: Please select a unit from the left panel to configure its grid layout.
grid_configuration.remove_from_grid_error: Could not remove the service from the grid. Changes were reverted.
grid_configuration.drag_from_palette_hint: Drag to a grid cell to place, or click to use the first free cell
grid_configuration.drag_placed_hint: Drag to another cell to move (top-left snaps to that cell)
grid_configuration.resize_corner_hint: Drag the corner to resize width and height in grid cells
grid_configuration.zone_scope_hint: All branch services are listed here. Services tied to a service zone show the zone name under the title. You can also lay out zone-only tiles on that zone’s settings page.

ad_screen.title: Ad Screen
ad_screen.ad_width_help: Set to 0 to disable ads. Recommended: 20-30%
ad_screen.image_duration_help: How long each image displays before switching
ad_screen.upload_desc: Upload images (JPEG, PNG, GIF) or videos (MP4, WebM)
ad_screen.library_desc: Select materials to display on the ad screen and manage your library
ad_screen.save_error: Could not save ad screen settings
ad_screen.invalid_file_type: Invalid file type. Please upload an image or video.
ad_screen.recent_calls_history_limit_help: How many rows to show in “Last called” on the ticket screen. Use 0 for no limit.

kiosk_settings.title: Kiosk Settings
kiosk_settings.pin_help: 6-digit PIN for accessing settings on the kiosk
kiosk_settings.welcome_section_desc: Text shown on the kiosk home screen above the service grid (optional; defaults are used if empty).
kiosk_settings.welcome_title_placeholder: How can we help you today?
kiosk_settings.welcome_title_help: Large headline centered above the service buttons.
kiosk_settings.welcome_subtitle_placeholder: Select a service below to join the queue.
kiosk_settings.welcome_subtitle_help: Optional second line under the welcome title.
kiosk_settings.ticket_text_section_desc: Shown only in the ticket confirmation dialog after the guest takes a number (not on the main screen).
kiosk_settings.header_placeholder: Text at the top of the ticket confirmation dialog
kiosk_settings.footer_placeholder: Text at the bottom of the ticket confirmation dialog
kiosk_settings.printer_connection_admin_hint: Network: IP and port on the LAN. System: exact queue name on the kiosk PC (set on device or type here).
kiosk_settings.logo_screen_hint: Shown in the kiosk header. Color images are fine.
kiosk_settings.printer_logo_upload_hint: Used only on thermal receipts. Prefer simple black-and-white artwork (PNG, JPEG, BMP, SVG, WebP). If empty, the screen logo is printed.
kiosk_settings.feedback_url_help: URL for the feedback form. Use '{{ticketId}}' to insert the ticket ID.
kiosk_settings.show_unit_in_header: Show unit name in kiosk header
kiosk_settings.show_unit_in_header_desc: Shown on the left next to the logo. Disable for a logo-only bar.
kiosk_settings.kiosk_unit_label_help: Leave empty to use the unit name from branch settings.
kiosk_settings.test_print_target_missing: Check printer IP or queue name
kiosk_settings.test_print_label_unsupported: Label printer test is not available yet.
kiosk_settings.system_printer_required: Enter the system printer queue name

guest_survey.title: Guest survey at counter
guest_survey.description: Configure surveys for this branch or zone. Shown on paired counter tablets while a visit is in service.
guest_survey.builder_hint: Add rating scales and optional text blocks (hints) without writing JSON. Each block needs an id and text in at least one language.
guest_survey.default_template_hint: Use the block editor below. Scales collect a number; text blocks are shown as hints only.
guest_survey.scale_presentation_label: How answers look on the tablet
guest_survey.scale_numeric_hint: Guests tap a number from min to max; stored as that number.
guest_survey.scale_icons_range_hint: Always five steps (1–5). Guests tap stars or hearts; stored as 1–5 for reporting.
guest_survey.validation_block_id_required: Each block needs a non-empty id.
guest_survey.validation_scale_label_required: Each scale needs text in English or Russian.
guest_survey.validation_info_label_required: Each text block needs content in English or Russian.
guest_survey.validation_scale_range: Scale min and max must be integers, 0–20, with min less than max.
guest_survey.validation_scale_icon_preset_required: Choose an icon style for icon scales.
guest_survey.feature_locked: Guest surveys at counters are not included in your plan.
guest_survey.no_responses: No survey responses for this visitor
guest_survey.counter_pairing_hint: — create a "guest rating" device with pairing code for each counter.
guest_survey.completion_hint: Optional Markdown shown on the counter tablet after submit. Use the toolbar or source mode.
guest_survey.completion_images_hint: Images: toolbar “image” button opens a dialog—drop a file on the small area or paste an image URL. You can also paste images from the clipboard into the text.
guest_survey.completion_modal_image_description: Upload a file or enter a direct image URL, then save.
guest_survey.completion_modal_image_drop_compact: Drop a file or click (JPG, PNG, WebP, SVG)
guest_survey.completion_modal_image_need_file_or_url: Choose a file or enter an image URL.
guest_survey.completion_upload_image_type_error: Use JPG, PNG, WebP, or SVG.
guest_survey.completion_placeholder: Leave empty to use the default thank-you text on the tablet.
guest_survey.display_mode_stepped_hint: Each block on its own screen: Next between steps, Submit on the last.
guest_survey.terminal_theme_hint: Custom colors for the paired counter display while this survey is active. Header and body can fall back to unit ad-screen colors if left unset when this is on.
guest_survey.terminal_theme_invalid: Check color values (use #RRGGBB or the picker).
guest_survey.idle_section_hint: Optional slideshow on the counter display when no survey is in progress or before a ticket is taken. Text and images use the interval below; videos advance when playback ends.
guest_survey.idle_interval_hint: Not used for video slides. Ignored when the slide list is empty.
guest_survey.idle_empty_slides: No idle slides — the terminal uses default waiting content.
guest_survey.idle_text_placeholder: Markdown for this slide (optional images use the same toolbar as the thank-you message).
guest_survey.validation_idle_interval: Idle slideshow: set seconds between 1 and 300 when slides are present.
guest_survey.validation_idle_text_empty: Each text slide needs content in English or Russian.
guest_survey.validation_idle_media_missing: Upload a file for each image or video slide.
guest_survey.idle_upload_type_image: Use JPG, PNG, WebP, or SVG for image slides.
guest_survey.idle_upload_type_video: Use MP4, WebM, MOV, or M4V for video slides.

slots.title: Slot Configuration
slots.configuration_desc: Set working hours and interval for appointment slots.
slots.calendar_readonly_title: Capacity is managed in the calendar
slots.calendar_readonly_desc: This unit uses Yandex Calendar (CalDAV) for slot capacity. Weekly capacity, generation, and day overrides are read-only here; edit events in the connected calendar.
slots.capacity_desc: Set the maximum number of appointments per slot for each service.
slots.generation_desc: Generate daily slots based on the configuration above. Existing slots in the range will be overwritten.
slots.day_management_desc: Manage slots for a specific day.
slots.no_slots_generated: No slots generated for this day.
slots.capacity_hint: Hint: "Total Capacity" includes existing bookings. "Available" is calculated as Total - Booked. If you want to add 1 more slot to a fully booked time, increase Total Capacity by 1.

pre_registrations.title: Pre-registrations
pre_registrations.select_unit: Select a unit to manage pre-registrations
pre_registrations.create_desc: Fill in the details to create a new pre-registration.
pre_registrations.name_required: Enter first name or last name
pre_registrations.cancel_confirm_desc: The calendar slot will be freed if it was linked to Yandex Calendar.
pre_registrations.reschedule_pick_calendar_slot: Pick a new calendar slot for the new date or time
pre_registrations.reschedule_calendar_unavailable: No slots available to reschedule; try another day or turn off calendar integration temporarily

calendar_integration.title: Yandex Calendar (CalDAV)
calendar_integration.description: Connect a Yandex account with an app password. Slot capacity for pre-registration is imported from this calendar; weekly slot settings become read-only while enabled.
calendar_integration.timezone_hint: IANA name (e.g. Europe/Moscow) for interpreting calendar slot times.
calendar_integration.required_fields: Calendar path and Yandex username are required
calendar_integration.load_error: Could not load calendar integration settings.
calendar_integration.unit_readonly_hint: The unit for this connection is set when the calendar is created and cannot be changed here.
calendar_integration.delete_error: Could not remove this calendar connection
calendar_integration.delete_confirm_desc: Pre-registrations that reference this connection may need to be canceled first.
calendar_integration.create_dialog_description: Choose the unit and enter CalDAV credentials. You can add several calendars per unit (up to four).
calendar_integration.required_fields_create: Calendar path, Yandex login, and app password are required when the calendar is enabled.
calendar_integration.limit_error: This unit already has the maximum of four calendar connections.
calendar_integration.create_dialog_google_note: Google Calendar: use “Connect Google Calendar” on this page, sign in with Google, then choose which calendar to connect.
calendar_integration.google_readonly_hint: CalDAV URL and Google sign-in are fixed when you connect and cannot be changed here.
calendar_integration.add_menu_google_hint: Google sign-in, then pick a calendar
calendar_integration.google_connect_dialog_desc: You will be redirected to Google sign-in. After consent, you can choose which calendar to connect for this unit.
calendar_integration.google_connect_unavailable: Google connection is not configured on the server (OAuth).
calendar_integration.google_oauth_err_no_refresh: Google did not return a refresh token. Try again and approve access.
calendar_integration.google_oauth_err_not_configured: Google integration is not configured on the server.
calendar_integration.google_oauth_err_userinfo: Could not read your email from Google.
calendar_integration.google_oauth_err_limit: This unit already has the maximum of four calendar connections.
calendar_integration.google_oauth_err_forbidden: You do not have access to this unit.
calendar_integration.google_oauth_err_pick_save: Could not save your sign-in session. Please try again.
calendar_integration.google_pick_dialog_desc: Pick the calendar this unit should use. Only calendars you can edit are listed.
calendar_integration.google_pick_empty: No writable calendars were returned for this account.
calendar_integration.google_pick_error: Something went wrong while connecting the calendar.
calendar_integration.google_pick_session_expired: This sign-in session expired. Start Google connection again.

staff.title: Staff Panel

workstation.break_needs_no_ticket: Finish or transfer the active ticket before taking a break.

scope.title: Services you serve at this counter
scope.hint: Only tickets for the selected services appear in the queue and are eligible for Call next.

visitor_context.title: Visitor notes & history
visitor_context.change_visitor_hint: While the ticket is called or in service, open Link visitor: search the directory or enter name and phone manually (a new profile is created when needed).
visitor_context.visitor_min_chars: Enter at least 2 characters to search.
visitor_context.history_needs_visitor: Link a visitor above to see their past visits here.
visitor_context.comment_placeholder: Notes visible to your team for this ticket…
visitor_context.anonymous_hint: History is not available for anonymous walk-ins.
visitor_context.no_client: No linked visitor profile for this ticket.
visitor_context.link_modal_description: Find someone in the directory or fill in the fields — a new profile is created for a new phone number when needed.
visitor_context.pick_from_results: Pick a row below to fill the form, or type the details yourself.
visitor_context.visitor_name_required: Enter a first or last name.
visitor_context.tags_hint: Toggle tags for this visitor profile in the unit directory. Changes are audited; your reason is appended to operator notes.
visitor_context.tags_no_definitions: No tag presets exist for this unit yet. An organization admin can add them.
visitor_context.tags_reason_placeholder: Short note why you are changing tags (required to save)
visitor_context.tags_reason_required: Enter a reason for the tag change.

current.title: Current ticket
current.idle_subtitle: Call the next ticket from the queue when you are ready to serve.
current.idle_hint: The visitor card and photo will appear here after you call someone.
current.break_subtitle: Queue actions stay unavailable until you resume.

actions.title: Queue Actions
actions.returnToQueue_hint: Return this ticket to waiting in the same service zone (queue number unchanged).

queue.title: Waiting Queue
queue.list_scoped_hint: Only tickets for the services selected under «Services».
queue.list_show_all_hint: All waiting tickets are listed — use «Call» on a row to summon any. «Call next» still only considers the services selected under «Services».
queue.only_my_zone_hint_on: Only tickets in the same waiting pool as this counter are listed (aligned with Call next).
queue.only_my_zone_hint_off: Waiting tickets from every pool in this unit may appear (subject to the toggles above).

create_ticket.title: New ticket
create_ticket.description: Pick a service and optionally attach a visitor from the unit directory.
create_ticket.visitor_hint: Search by name or phone. Leave empty for an anonymous walk-in ticket.
create_ticket.visitor_min_chars: Enter at least 2 characters to search.

staff.selectUnitNoUnits: No units assigned to your account.

directory.pageSubtitle: Pick a workstation to open the staff queue for that station.
directory.insightBody: Balance load across zones. A maintenance state for counters may appear here in a future update.

support.fabAria: Report an issue from this page
support.integrationUnavailable: Support ticket integration is not configured on the server
support.dialogDescription: Describe the issue — a ticket will be sent to support.
support.detailSubtitle: Status is synced from the external ticketing system
support.markIrrelevantConfirmTitle: Are you sure you want to cancel this request?
support.markIrrelevantConfirmDescription: Confirm your choice: Yes cancels the request, No leaves it as is.
support.markIrrelevantUnavailable: Could not post the comment on the external ticket
support.detailForbidden: You do not have access to this request
support.appealEmpty: No saved description for this request.
support.commentsUnavailable: Comments are only available for Yandex Tracker tickets.
support.commentEmailEmptyBody: The message was sent by email
support.shareSectionHint: Grant read access to colleagues in your company.
support.shareSearchPlaceholder: Type at least 2 characters (name or email)
support.shareUnavailable: Sharing is only available for Yandex Tracker tickets.

staff.transfer_no_zones: No service zones exist under this subdivision.
staff.transfer_service_required: Select a service that is allowed in the target zone.
staff.transfer_no_services_in_zone: No ticket-issuing services are available for this zone.
staff.transfer_comment_hint: Unchanged text leaves notes as they are. Clearing the field removes the note when you transfer.

kiosk.title: Welcome to QuokkaQ
kiosk.subtitle: Take a ticket or check-in with booking
kiosk.server_frozen_message: This location is closed for end-of-day processing. Please try again in a few minutes.
kiosk.noServicesAvailable: No services available at this level
kiosk.servicesUnavailableMessage: We could not load this unit's services. Check the connection and try again.
kiosk.kiosk_zone_missing_parent: This kiosk URL points to a service zone that is not linked to a subdivision. Contact an administrator.
kiosk.unitLoadErrorMessage: The server may be unreachable, the terminal pairing may be invalid, or this unit no longer exists. Try again, or reset pairing on this desktop app.
kiosk.stillLoadingKioskHint: If this never finishes, the saved connection may be wrong.
kiosk.desktop_reset_pairing_short: Clear saved pairing on this device and show the setup screen again.
kiosk.welcome_default_title: How can we help you today?
kiosk.welcome_default_subtitle: Select a service below to join the queue.

ticket.title: Your Ticket
ticket.wait: Please wait for your number to be called
ticket.proceed: Proceed to the counter when called
ticket.scanQrCode: Scan the QR code to open the ticket on your phone

kiosk.ticketCreationFailed: Failed to create ticket. Please try again.

messages.checkInSuccess: Check-in successful! Your ticket number is: {number}
messages.invalidBookingCode: Invalid booking code or check-in failed.

phone_identification.title: Your phone number
phone_identification.subtitle: Optional. Enter your number to identify yourself, or skip.
phone_identification.submit_failed: Could not create the ticket with this number. Check the number and try again.

settings.title: Kiosk Settings
settings.show_header_desc: Show ticket header text in the ticket confirmation dialog
settings.show_footer_desc: Show ticket footer text in the ticket confirmation dialog
settings.printer_connection_hint: Network: raw TCP (e.g. port 9100). System: queue name from this computer (use refresh on the kiosk desktop app).
settings.system_printer_placeholder: e.g. EPSON_TM or queue from refresh
settings.system_printer_hint: Tap refresh (desktop app) to load queues from this device, or type the queue name manually.
settings.system_printer_required: Enter or select a printer queue name
settings.test_print_target_missing: Check printer IP or queue name
settings.logo_screen_hint: Shown in the kiosk header. Color images are fine.
settings.printer_logo_upload_hint: Used only on thermal receipts. Prefer simple black-and-white artwork (PNG, JPEG, BMP, SVG, WebP). If empty, the screen logo is printed.
settings.show_unit_in_header_desc: On the left, next to the logo. Turn off to hide the title.
settings.kiosk_unit_label_help: Leave empty to use the unit name.

lock_screen.contact_admin: This kiosk is currently locked. Please contact an administrator.

errors.not_found: Incorrect number or date has not arrived yet
errors.too_early: Time has not arrived yet, you can enter the number 30 minutes before start

counter_display.pair_desc: Enter the pairing code from Settings → Desktop terminals.
counter_display.no_survey: No survey is configured for this queue.
counter_display.feature_locked: This feature is not enabled for your organization.
counter_display.wrong_terminal_type: This code is for a ticket kiosk, not a counter display. Create a counter display terminal in Settings.
counter_display.reset_icon_aria: Device options. Tap five times within a few seconds to reset pairing.

counter_board.pair_desc: Enter the pairing code from Settings → Desktop terminals (device type: counter board). You can open this page with ?code=…
counter_board.feature_locked: This feature is not enabled for your organization.
counter_board.wrong_terminal_type: This code is for a ticket kiosk. In Settings → Desktop terminals, create a counter board terminal (kind counter_board) bound to this counter.
counter_board.reset_icon_aria: Device options. Tap five times within a few seconds to reset pairing.

screen.title: QuokkaQ
screen.subtitle: Queue Management System
screen.ticketsLoadError: Could not load the queue for this screen. Check the connection or try again.

upload.fileTooLarge: File size must be less than 5MB
upload.hint: Supported formats: JPG, PNG, SVG, WebP. Max 5MB.

login.title: Login
login.pickMethodDescription: Enter your work email, then choose password or corporate SSO.
login.error: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
login.chooseOrganizationDescription: You have access to more than one organization. Pick one to continue.
login.tenantSlugHint: Short code from your login URL (lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens).
login.ssoDialogDescription: Enter your organization slug. We verify it and send you to your identity provider.
login.ssoSlugRequired: Enter your organization slug to continue.
login.ssoNotEnabled: SSO is not enabled for this organization.
login.ssoTenantNotFound: No organization found with this slug.
login.ssoCallbackError: Single sign-on could not be completed. Try again or use your password.
login.ssoCallbackErrorMissingCode: The SSO callback is missing a one-time code. Start sign-in again from the login page.
login.ssoCallbackErrorExchangeFailed: We could not exchange the SSO code for a session. Try again or use your password.

ssoError.no_tenant_access: You do not have access to this organization. Ask your administrator to grant access.
ssoError.not_provisioned: Your account is not linked to this organization. Ask your administrator to invite you or enable automatic provisioning.
ssoError.email_required: Sign-in failed because a verified email address is required. Check your identity provider settings.
ssoError.email_unverified: Your identity provider did not confirm your email address. Verify your email with the provider and try again.
ssoError.saml_email_missing: The organization’s identity provider did not send an email address. Ask your administrator to map email in the SAML assertion.
ssoError.denied: Sign-in was denied. Try again or contact your administrator.

signup.title: Create account
signup.description: Register your organization and start the trial.
signup.name: Your name
signup.companySlugHint: Optional. Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only, 3–63 characters. Leave empty to generate one automatically.
signup.companySlugInvalid: Invalid slug: use 3–63 characters, only a–z, 0–9, and single hyphens between segments. This name is reserved.
signup.conflict: This email may already be registered, or the slug is taken.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email to reset your password
forgotPassword.success: If an account with that email exists, we sent you a reset link.
forgotPassword.requestError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.error: Failed to reset password. Token may be invalid or expired.

supervisor.title: Shift Management
supervisor.noUnitsAssigned: No units assigned to your account
supervisor.forceReleaseWarning: Are you sure you want to force release counter "{counterName}"? The active ticket will be marked as completed.
supervisor.eodWarning: This will execute the End of Day operations. This action cannot be undone!
supervisor.eodStep1: All active tickets will be marked as served
supervisor.eodStep2: All waiting tickets will be marked as no-show
supervisor.eodStep4: Ticket number sequences will be reset for tomorrow
supervisor.eodIrreversible: This action is irreversible. Please confirm you want to proceed.
supervisor.errorEOD: Failed to execute End of Day

dashboardUi.kpiEfficiencyHint: Share of counters currently in use (estimate).
dashboardUi.monitoringDescription: Live status of stations (counters) for the selected unit
dashboardUi.zonePickerLabel: Child subdivisions under this service zone
dashboardUi.zonesEmpty: No child subdivisions under this service zone yet.
dashboardUi.zonesEmptyDetail: When there are no child subdivisions, stations on the service zone itself are shown here. Otherwise add nested subdivisions under this zone in admin settings.
dashboardUi.noActiveTicket: No active ticket on this station
dashboardUi.activityDescriptionLive: Six most recent ticket events; full history in the log
dashboardUi.activityPendingScope: Select a workplace above or wait for the list to load.
dashboardUi.activityEmpty: No ticket events for this unit yet.
dashboardUi.journalDescriptionOwnOnly: Your ticket actions in this unit (audit trail).
dashboardUi.journalCardDescription: Chronological list for the selected unit.
dashboardUi.journalFilterSearchPlaceholder: Queue number, ticket ID, or visitor name…
dashboardUi.journalFilterDateRangeHint: Inclusive range; event date is compared in the unit time zone.
dashboardUi.journalFilterTimezoneHint: Weekdays and date range use the unit time zone.
dashboardUi.snapshotDescription: Today's summary (full metrics when reporting is available)
dashboardUi.listQueueDescription: All waiting tickets, longest wait first

invitations.title: Invitations
invitations.subject: Subject
invitations.delete_confirm_desc: This action cannot be undone. All mentions of the user will be removed from the system.

ticket_page.feedback_url_help: URL for the feedback form. Use {{ticketId}} to insert the ticket ID.

setup.title: System Setup
setup.description: Create the first administrator account to get started.
setup.name: Name

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Connect external systems
integrations.trackerIntro: Yandex Tracker: queue and issue types for marketing leads and signup notifications.
integrations.leadsQueueHint: Queue key for tickets created from the marketing site and registration flows. Also set YANDEX_TRACKER_LEADS_QUEUE when not using the database value.
integrations.typeHint: Issue type key or numeric id. Leave empty to omit the type field when creating an issue.
integrations.supportIntro: In-app support reports (SUPPORT_REPORT_PLATFORM=yandex_tracker): queue and optional issue type. Values here override YANDEX_TRACKER_QUEUE when set.
integrations.supportQueueHint: Queue key for tickets created from support reports. If empty, the API uses YANDEX_TRACKER_QUEUE from the server environment.

overview.title: Platform
overview.subtitle: Manage organizations, subscriptions, plans, and manual invoices.
overview.loadError: Could not load platform overview. Check your connection or try again.

companyDetail.effectiveAtFuture: Effective time must be in the future (UTC).
companyDetail.subscriptionPeriodDateInvalid: Enter a valid period start and end.
companyDetail.createSubscriptionWithInvoiceHint: Creates one subscription row for this company and links the invoice in a single step.
companyDetail.linkToExistingSubscriptionHint: If unchecked, the invoice is created without a subscription link (you can attach it later via API).
companyDetail.invoiceAmountInvalid: Enter a positive amount in minor units.
companyDetail.invoiceCreateSubConflict: This company already has a subscription; uncheck “create subscription” or use “link to subscription”.
companyDetail.invoiceSubscriptionPeriodRequired: Subscription period start and end are required.
companyDetail.invoiceSubscriptionPeriodOrder: Subscription period end must be after start.
companyDetail.saasOperatorDesc: One organization per deployment: unlimited resource quotas and the canonical legal profile for invoices and platform use. Enabling this clears the operator flag on every other company.
companyDetail.invoiceWizardHint: Create a multi-line draft, set VAT and payment options, then issue a numbered invoice (QQ-YYYY-NNNNN).
companyDetail.toastSaasOperatorError: Could not update SaaS operator setting: {message}
companyDetail.loginPolicyDesc: Tenant slug for URLs, strict public metadata, opaque links, and JIT user creation on first SSO (coordinate with tenant admins).
companyDetail.loginPolicyStrictHint: Hide organization branding/metadata from GET /public/tenants/{slug} to reduce slug enumeration.
companyDetail.loginPolicyOpaqueHint: Prefer login links with tokens instead of slug-based deep links for branded login.
companyDetail.loginPolicyJitHint: Allow creating a user on first successful SSO when the tenant enables SSO (subject to server rules).

plans.title: Subscription plans
plans.name: Name
plans.nameEnHint: Shown on the English marketing site and in the app when the UI is in English. If empty, the primary name is used.
plans.priceHint: Major units for the selected currency (e.g. 2900.50). Sent to the API as minor units.
plans.priceInvalid: Enter a valid non-negative price for this currency.
plans.publicHint: Public plans appear on the marketing site and in the in-app plan list. Internal plans are only visible to SaaS operators.
plans.promotedHint: Only one plan can be promoted at a time. It appears as the highlighted recommended tier on the marketing site and in-app pricing.
plans.limitsInvalid: Each limit must be unlimited (−1) or a non-negative whole number.
plans.displayOrderHint: Lower numbers appear first in public plan lists (marketing and in-app pricing).
plans.displayOrderInvalid: Enter a whole number for display order.
plans.allowInstantPurchaseHint: If off, checkout is blocked for this plan (public plans will use a sales request flow later).

invoiceDraft.allowYookassa: Allow YooKassa payment link (tenant requests URL)
invoiceDraft.provisionOnPayment: Provision subscription when invoice is paid
invoiceDraft.lineMoneyHint: Amounts are in normal currency units (comma as decimal separator where your locale uses it).

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Check the form and try again.
errors.quantityInvalid: Each line needs a positive quantity.
errors.unitPriceInvalid: Enter a valid unit price (currency amount, not kopecks/cents as a plain integer).
errors.descriptionRequired: Description is required when no catalog item is selected.
errors.discountBoth: Use either discount % or discount amount, not both.
errors.discountAmountInvalid: Enter a valid discount amount in currency units.
errors.vatRateInvalid: Enter a valid VAT rate between 0 and 100 for lines that are not VAT-exempt.
errors.planRequired: Select a plan for subscription lines.
errors.periodStartInvalid: Enter a valid subscription period start.
errors.tooManyLicenseLines: Only one line may reference a subscription plan.
errors.issueInvoiceFailedDraftRestored: Could not issue the invoice ({detail}). The draft was reverted to its previous saved state.
errors.issueInvoiceFailedRollbackFailed: Could not issue the invoice ({detail}). Reverting the draft also failed ({rollback}). Refresh the page and verify the invoice on the server.

invoiceDraft.referenceCompaniesError: Could not load organizations for this draft.
invoiceDraft.referenceCompanyError: Could not load the invoice company.

catalog.title: Catalog (nomenclature)
catalog.name: Name
catalog.dialogDescription: Add or edit a catalog line used on invoices.
catalog.fieldPriceHint: Amount in major units; use a comma for fractional part (e.g. 1 234,56).
catalog.validationVatRate: Enter a valid VAT rate between 0 and 100.

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
subscriptions.createDescription: Assign a plan to an organization without an existing subscription (organizations that already have one are disabled here).
subscriptions.validationCompanyPlan: Select an organization and a plan.
subscriptions.emptyListHint: No subscriptions yet. Create one for an organization without billing.
subscriptions.companyHasSubscriptionInfo: Organizations with a subscription are disabled in this dialog. Add another period from the company page or via manual invoices.
subscriptions.createSubCompanyHasSubscription: Choose an organization that does not already have a subscription.
subscriptions.periodOptionalHint: Leave both empty to use the default billing period (now through +1 month, UTC).
subscriptions.periodBothOrNeither: Set both period start and end, or leave both empty.
subscriptions.periodOrderInvalid: Period end must be after start.
subscriptions.createManualInvoiceWithSub: Create manual invoice linked to this subscription
subscriptions.createManualInvoiceHint: Subscription and manual invoice are created in one step with the amount and due date below.
subscriptions.invoiceWithSubValidation: Enter a positive amount and due date for the invoice.
subscriptions.toastCreateFailed: Could not create subscription. Check the form and try again.
subscriptions.toastSubCreatedInvoiceCreateFailed: Subscription created, but the invoice draft could not be created. Create it manually under Platform → Invoices.
subscriptions.toastSubCreatedInvoiceIssueFailed: Subscription created. The draft invoice could not be issued automatically. Open Platform → Invoices and issue invoice {invoiceId}.

wiki.fallbackNotice: This page is not available in your selected language yet. The English version is shown below.

workstations.title: Workstations
workstations.description: Choose a station to open the staff queue.
workstations.empty: No stations available for your account.
workstations.name: Name

profile.profilePhotoHint: JPG, PNG, SVG, WebP. Max 5 MB.

pricing.title: Pricing Plans
pricing.description: Choose the right plan for you
pricing.pageTitle: Choose the Right Plan for You
pricing.pageSubtitle: Start with a free 14-day trial. Cancel anytime.

trial.a: The 14-day trial includes full access to all features of the selected plan without requiring payment details.

changePlan.a: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time. Changes take effect immediately, and we'll prorate the payment.

payment.a: We accept credit cards through YooKassa. Enterprise clients can pay by invoice.

limits.q: What happens if I exceed limits?
limits.a: We'll notify you by email. You can upgrade your plan, or some features will be temporarily limited until the next billing period.

cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of organizations already using QuokkaQ

features.units: {count, plural, one {Up to # unit} other {Up to # units}}
features.users: {count, plural, one {Up to # user} other {Up to # users}}
features.tickets: {count, plural, one {Up to # ticket per month} other {Up to # tickets per month}}
features.counters: {count, plural, one {# service counter} other {# service counters}}

organization.title: Organization Management
organization.loadError: We could not load your company profile. Check your connection or sign in again.
organization.paymentAccountsBicHint: Pick a row from bank hints
organization.addressPlaceholder: e.g. 123 Main Street, City, Postal code

quickLinks.loginDesc: Tenant slug, OIDC, and staff login links
quickLinks.integrationsDesc: Calendars (CalDAV), authentication (SSO), tenant slug. Opaque staff links: Organization → Login & SSO

loginSecurity.pageDescription: Generate opaque staff login links. Tenant slug and SSO are configured under Settings → Integrations → Authentication.
loginSecurity.loadError: We could not load your organization. Try again or sign in.
loginSecurity.slugDescription: Used in login URLs and SSO. Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
loginSecurity.slugHint: 3–63 characters. Cannot be a reserved name (e.g. api, login).
loginSecurity.saveError: Save failed. Check the values and try again.
loginSecurity.ssoDescription: Choose OpenID Connect or SAML. Register the URLs in your identity provider, then enter the required settings.
loginSecurity.samlSlugRequiredDescription: SAML ACS and metadata URLs include your tenant slug. Save the slug in the section above, then return here to configure SAML and copy the URLs.
loginSecurity.samlIdpMetadataHint: HTTPS URL of your IdP SAML metadata (for example Azure AD federation metadata).
loginSecurity.enabledHint: When enabled, users with matching email domains can sign in via your IdP.
loginSecurity.clientSecretPlaceholderSet: Leave blank to keep the current secret
loginSecurity.secretSetHint: A secret is already stored. Enter a new value only to replace it.
loginSecurity.emailDomainsHint: Comma-separated. Used for login routing (e.g. acme.com).
loginSecurity.opaqueDescription: Generate a one-time style link for strict login mode or support. Share carefully.
loginSecurity.opaqueHint: Example URL (token expires; treat as sensitive):
loginSecurity.authMovedDescription: Organization slug and single sign-on (OIDC / SAML) are now configured in Settings → Integrations.

billing.title: Billing & Subscription
billing.description: Manage your plan, payments, and invoices
billing.trialEndingDesc: {days, plural, one {# day remaining. Add a payment method to continue using the service.} other {# days remaining. Add a payment method to continue using the service.}}
billing.trialExpiredDesc: Your trial period is over. Add a payment method to continue using the service.
billing.pastDueDesc: Failed to charge payment method. Please update your payment details.
billing.cancelWarning: Your subscription will be canceled on {date}. Access will remain until that date.
billing.pendingPlanChangeDesc: Your plan will change to {plan} on {date}.
billing.viewInvoicesDesc: View and download all your invoices
billing.planRequestOnlyMessage: Self-service checkout is not available for this plan. Please contact sales; a request workflow is coming soon.

pricing.title: Plans & pricing
pricing.description: Compare available plans and request a change through support.
pricing.pageIntro: Switching plans is not instant: after you submit a request, our team will review it and apply the change.
pricing.billingHintPrefix: For invoices, usage, and payment methods, open
pricing.toastRequestCreated: Your plan change request was submitted.
pricing.toastTrackerUnavailable: Plan change requests are temporarily unavailable. Please contact support.
pricing.noSubscription: No active subscription was found. Complete billing setup under Billing or contact support.
pricing.customTermsBody: Tell us about your volume, regions, or integrations — we will prepare an offer and get back to you.
pricing.customTermsDialogDescription: Your name, email, and organization are taken from your account. Add a short comment for our team.
pricing.customTermsToastTrackerUnavailable: Requests are temporarily unavailable. Please contact support.
pricing.customTermsToastForbidden: Only organization owners can submit requests. Ask your billing administrator.

invoices.title: Invoice History
invoices.description: All your payments and invoices in one place

invoiceDetail.qrCaption: Scan to pay via bank app (Russia)
invoiceDetail.vendorNotConfigured: Contact your administrator to correct billing information.
invoiceDetail.contactAdminPaymentSetup: Contact your administrator to set a default bank account for invoices.
invoiceDetail.payLinkErrorGeneric: Could not start online payment. Try again or contact support.

usage.title: Resource Usage
usage.description: Track usage and quotas for your plan
usage.approachingDesc: Consider upgrading your plan to increase limits.
usage.recommendationsDesc: Resource usage is tracked daily. You'll be notified when reaching 90% of any limit.
usage.tipDesc: If you regularly approach limits, consider upgrading your plan for more comfortable usage.

welcome.title: Welcome to QuokkaQ!
welcome.subtitle: Let's set up your queue management system in a few simple steps

welcome.tipDesc: You can configure all settings later. We'll only do the basic setup now.

unit.title: Create Your First Unit
unit.subtitle: A unit is your branch, office, or service location
unit.nameHelp: This name will be displayed on screens and tickets
unit.codeInvalid: Code must contain 2-6 uppercase letters or numbers
unit.codeHelp: Unique code of 2-6 characters (letters and numbers)
unit.tipDesc: You can add more units later in the admin panel.

services.subtitle: What services do you provide to customers? Add the main ones to start.
services.canSkipDesc: You can add services later in the admin panel.

rolesHelp.title: User Roles:

rolesHelp.supervisor: Supervisor - can view statistics and manage queue

team.canSkipDesc: You can invite staff members later.

steps.counters: Set up service counters in the admin panel
